translation.en: O He who created and proportioned
O He who decreed and guided
O He who removes affliction
O He who hears secret counsel
O He who rescues the drowning
O He who saves the perishing
O He who heals the sick
O He who causes laughter and weeping
O He who causes death and gives life

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَلَقَ الزَّوْجَيْنِ الذَّكَرَ وَالْأُنْثَى

translation.en: O He who created the pair, male and female
translation.tr: Ey erkek ve dişi çifti yaratan

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ فِي الْبَرِّ وَالْبَحْرِ سَبِيلُهُ

translation.en: O He whose way is in the land and the sea
translation.tr: Ey karada ve denizde yolu olan

translation.en: O He whose signs are in the horizons
O He whose proof is in the signs
O He whose power is in death
O He whose lesson is in the graves
O He whose sovereignty is on the Day of Judgment
O He whose awe is in the reckoning
O He whose judgment is in the Balance
O He whose reward is in Paradise
O He whose punishment is in the Fire

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He to whom the fearful flee
O He to whom sinners turn in alarm
O He whom the penitent seek
O He for whom the ascetics yearn
O He in whom the seekers find comfort
O He in whom the lovers take pride
O He in whose pardon the wrongdoers trust
O He in whom those with certainty find peace
O He upon whom the trusting rely
O He to whom those who entrust, entrust their affairs
translation.tr: Ey işlerini havale edenlerin havale ettiği

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Living before every living being
translation.tr: Ey her diriden önce Diri olan

translation.en: O Living after every living being
translation.tr: Ey her diriden sonra Diri olan

lines.arabic: يَا حَيُّ الَّذِي لَيْسَ كَمِثْلِهِ حَيٌّ

translation.en: O Living One like whom there is no living being

lines.arabic: يَا حَيُّ الَّذِي لَا يُشَارِكُهُ حَيٌّ

translation.en: O Living One whom no living being shares
translation.tr: Ey hiçbir dirinin ortak olmadığı Diri

lines.arabic: يَا حَيُّ الَّذِي لَا يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى حَيٍّ
lines.transliteration: Yā Ḥayyu'lladhī lā yaḥtāju ilā ḥayy

translation.en: O Living One who needs no living being
translation.tr: Ey hiçbir diriye muhtaç olmayan Diri

lines.arabic: يَا حَيُّ الَّذِي يُمِيتُ كُلَّ حَيٍّ

translation.en: O Living One who causes every living being to die

lines.arabic: يَا حَيُّ الَّذِي يَرْزُقُ كُلَّ حَيٍّ

translation.en: O Living One who sustains every living being
translation.tr: Ey her diriye rızık veren Diri

lines.arabic: يَا حَيّاً لَمْ يَرِثِ الْحَيَاةَ مِنْ حَيٍّ
lines.transliteration: Yā ḥayyan lam yarithi'l-ḥayāta min ḥayy

translation.en: O Living One who did not inherit life from any living being
translation.tr: Ey hayatı hiçbir diriden miras almayan Diri

translation.en: O Living One who gives life to the dead

lines.arabic: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā Ḥayyu yā Qayyūmu lā taʾkhudhuhū sinatun wa lā nawm

translation.en: O Living, O Self-Subsisting, whom neither slumber nor sleep overtakes
translation.tr: Ey Hayy, ey Kayyum, kendisini ne uyuklama ne uyku tutmayan

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَهُ ذِكْرٌ لَا يُنْسَى
lines.transliteration: Yā man lahu dhikrun lā yunsā

translation.en: O He whose remembrance is never forgotten

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَهُ نُورٌ لَا يُطْفَأُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lahu nūrun lā yuṭfaʾ

translation.en: O He whose light is never extinguished

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَهُ نِعَمٌ لَا تُحْصَى
lines.transliteration: Yā man lahu niʿamun lā tuḥṣā

translation.en: O He whose blessings cannot be counted

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَهُ مُلْكٌ لَا يَزُولُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lahu mulkun lā yazūl

translation.en: O He whose sovereignty never ceases

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَهُ جَلَالٌ لَا يُكَيَّفُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lahu jalālun lā yukhayyaf

translation.en: O He whose majesty cannot be described

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَهُ كَمَالٌ لَا يُدْرَكُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lahu kamālun lā yudrak

translation.en: O He whose perfection cannot be grasped

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَهُ قَضَاءٌ لَا يُرَدُّ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lahu qaḍāʾun lā yuradd

translation.en: O He whose decree cannot be reversed

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَهُ صِفَاتٌ لَا تُبَدَّلُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lahu ṣifātun lā tubaddal

translation.en: O He whose attributes cannot be altered

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَهُ نُعُوتٌ لَا تُغَيَّرُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lahu nuʿūtun lā tughayyar

translation.en: O He whose qualities cannot be changed
O Lord of all the worlds

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ يَا مُؤْمِنُ
lines.transliteration: Allāhumma innī asʾaluka bi-ismika yā Muʾmin

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You by Your name, O Granter of Security
O Guardian
O Creator
O Inspirer
O Clarifier
O Easer
O Beautifier
O Proclaimer
O Distributor
O Bestower of blessings

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُرَى فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ آثَارُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yurā fī kulli shayʾin āthāruh

translation.en: O He whose traces are seen in all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُرَى فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قُدْرَتُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yurā fī kulli shayʾin qudratuh

translation.en: O He whose power is seen in all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُرَى فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ حِكْمَتُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yurā fī kulli shayʾin ḥikmatuh

translation.en: O He whose wisdom is seen in all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُرَى فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ نِعْمَتُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yurā fī kulli shayʾin niʿmatuh

translation.en: O He whose blessings are seen in all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُرَى فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ رَحْمَتُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yurā fī kulli shayʾin raḥmatuh

translation.en: O He whose mercy is seen in all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُرَى فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ صَنْعَتُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yurā fī kulli shayʾin ṣanʿatuh

translation.en: O He whose craftsmanship is seen in all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُرَى فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ لُطْفُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yurā fī kulli shayʾin luṭfuh

translation.en: O He whose gentleness is seen in all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُرَى فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ عِلْمُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yurā fī kulli shayʾin ʿilmuh

translation.en: O He whose knowledge is seen in all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُرَى فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ عَدْلُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yurā fī kulli shayʾin ʿadluh

translation.en: O He whose justice is seen in all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُرَى فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ فَضْلُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yurā fī kulli shayʾin faḍluh

translation.en: O He whose grace is seen in all things

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ أَحَدٌ بِلَا ضِدٍّ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa aḥadun bilā ḍidd

translation.en: O He who is One without opposite

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فَرْدٌ بِلَا نِدٍّ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fardun bilā nidd

translation.en: O He who is Single without equal

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ صَمَدٌ بِلَا عَيْبٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa ṣamadun bilā ʿayb

translation.en: O He who is Self-Sufficient without defect

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ وِتْرٌ بِلَا كَيْفٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa witrun bilā kayf

translation.en: O He who is Odd without how

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ قَاضٍ بِلَا حَيْفٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa qāḍin bilā ḥayf

translation.en: O He who judges without injustice

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ رَبٌّ بِلَا وَزِيرٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa rabbun bilā wazīr

translation.en: O He who is Lord without minister

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ عَزِيزٌ بِلَا ذُلٍّ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa ʿazīzun bilā dhull

translation.en: O He who is Mighty without humiliation

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ غَنِيٌّ بِلَا فَقْرٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa ghaniyyun bilā faqr

translation.en: O He who is Rich without poverty

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مَلِكٌ بِلَا عَزْلٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa malikun bilā ʿazl

translation.en: O He who is King without dismissal

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مَوْصُوفٌ بِلَا شَبِيهٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa mawṣūfun bilā shabīh

translation.en: O He who is described without likeness

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا خَالِقَ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ

translation.en: O Creator of those in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey göklerde ve yerde olanları yaratan

lines.arabic: يَا رَازِقَ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ

translation.en: O Sustainer of those in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey göklerde ve yerde olanlara rızık veren

lines.arabic: يَا مَالِكَ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ

translation.en: O Owner of those in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey göklerde ve yerde olanların sahibi

lines.arabic: يَا مُدَبِّرَ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ

translation.en: O Director of those in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey göklerde ve yerde olanları idare eden

translation.en: O Light of the heavens and the earth
O Adornment of the heavens and the earth
O Pillar of the heavens and the earth
O Originator of the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey göklerin ve yerin yoktan yaratıcısı

translation.en: O Wondrous Maker of the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey göklerin ve yerin eşsiz yaratıcısı

translation.en: O Lord of Majesty and Generosity

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ يَا سَتَّارُ
lines.transliteration: Allāhumma innī asʾaluka bi-ismika yā Sattār

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You by Your name, O Concealer
O Oft-Forgiving
O Subduer
O Compeller
O Most Patient
O Benign
O Chooser
O Opener
O Granter of bountiful gifts
O One at rest

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He who created me and shaped me
O He who sustained me and nurtured me
translation.tr: Ey bana rızık verip terbiye eden

translation.en: O He who fed me and gave me drink
O He who drew me near and brought me close
O He who protected me and sufficed me
O He who preserved me and guarded me
O He who honored me and enriched me
translation.tr: Ey beni aziz kılıp zengin eden

translation.en: O He who granted me success and guided me
translation.tr: Ey beni muvaffak kılıp hidayet eden

translation.en: O He who befriended me and sheltered me
O He who causes me to die and gives me life

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He who establishes truth by His words

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَقْبَلُ التَّوْبَةَ عَنْ عِبَادِهِ

translation.en: O He who accepts repentance from His servants

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَحُولُ بَيْنَ الْمَرْءِ وَقَلْبِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yaḥūlu bayna'l-marʾi wa qalbih

translation.en: O He who comes between a person and their heart
translation.tr: Ey kişi ile kalbi arasına giren

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا تَنْفَعُ الشَّفَاعَةُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā tanfaʿu'sh-shafāʿatu illā bi-idhnih

translation.en: O He without whose permission intercession avails not
translation.tr: Ey izni olmadan şefaatin fayda vermediği

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنْ ضَلَّ عَنْ سَبِيلِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa aʿlamu biman ḍalla ʿan sabīlih

translation.en: O He who knows best who has strayed from His path
translation.tr: Ey yolundan sapanı en iyi bilen

translation.en: O He whose judgment none can reverse
O He whose decree none can repel
translation.tr: Ey kazasını geri çevirecek kimse olmayan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ انْقَادَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِأَمْرِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man inqāda kullu shayʾin li-amrih

translation.en: O He to whose command all things submit
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin emrine boyun eğdiği

translation.en: O He in whose right hand the heavens are folded
translation.tr: Ey göklerin sağ elinde dürülü olduğu

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُرْسِلُ الرِّيَاحَ بُشْراً بَيْنَ يَدَيْ رَحْمَتِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yursilu'r-riyāḥa bushran bayna yaday raḥmatih

translation.en: O He who sends the winds as glad tidings before His mercy
translation.tr: Ey rahmetinin önünde müjdeciler olarak rüzgârları gönderen

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He who made the earth a resting place
O He who made the mountains as pegs
O He who made the sun a lamp
O He who made the moon a light
O He who made the night a garment
O He who made the day for livelihood
O He who made sleep for rest
O He who made the sky a canopy
O He who made things in pairs
O He who made the Fire a place of ambush

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Allah, O One
O Glorious
O Witness
O Guide to right
O Praiser
O Inheritor
O Distresser
O Benefiter
O Resurrector
O Master

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Best known One who has been known
O Best worshipped One who has been worshipped
O Best thanked One who has been thanked
O Best remembered One who has been remembered
O Best praised One who has been praised
O Best existing One who has been sought
O Best asked One who has given
O Best Benefactor who has bestowed
O Best Responder who has responded
O Best Patron who has cared

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ تَوَاضَعَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِعَظَمَتِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man tawāḍaʿa kullu shayʾin li-ʿaẓamatih

translation.en: O He before whose greatness all things humble themselves
translation.tr: Ey azametine karşı her şeyin alçaldığı

lines.arabic: يَا مَنِ اسْتَسْلَمَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِقُدْرَتِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man istaslama kullu shayʾin li-qudratih

translation.en: O He to whose power all things surrender
translation.tr: Ey kudretine karşı her şeyin teslim olduğu

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَضَعَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِهَيْبَتِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man khaḍaʿa kullu shayʾin li-haybatih

translation.en: O He before whose awe all things bow
translation.tr: Ey heybetine karşı her şeyin boyun eğdiği

lines.arabic: يَا مَنِ انْقَادَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِعِزَّتِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man inqāda kullu shayʾin li-ʿizzatih

translation.en: O He to whose might all things submit
translation.tr: Ey izzetine karşı her şeyin itaat ettiği

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ ذَلَّ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِمُلْكِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man dhalla kullu shayʾin li-mulkih

translation.en: O He before whose sovereignty all things are humbled
translation.tr: Ey mülküne karşı her şeyin zelil olduğu

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَافَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ مِنْ خَشْيَتِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man khāfa kullu shayʾin min khashyatih

translation.en: O He whom all things fear from His awe

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ شَهِدَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِرُبُوبِيَّتِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man shahida kullu shayʾin li-rubūbiyyatih

translation.en: O He whose lordship all things bear witness to
translation.tr: Ey rububiyetine her şeyin şahitlik ettiği

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ سَبَّحَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ بِحَمْدِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man sabbaḥa kullu shayʾin bi-ḥamdih

translation.en: O He whom all things glorify with His praise
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin hamd ile tesbih ettiği

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ فَزِعَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ إِلَيْهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man faziʿa kullu shayʾin ilayh

translation.en: O He to whom all things turn in panic

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ قَامَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ بِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man qāma kullu shayʾin bih

translation.en: O He by whom all things subsist
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin kendisiyle ayakta durduğu

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Forgiver of sins
O Remover of troubles
O Ultimate of goals
O Bestower of abundant gifts
O Vast in forgiveness
O Spreader of blessings
O Hearer of voices
O Knower of hidden things
O Repeller of calamities
O Raiser of ranks

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ يَا شَفِيقُ
lines.transliteration: Allāhumma innī asʾaluka bi-ismika yā Shafīq

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You by Your name, O Compassionate
O Gentle Companion
O Preserver
O All-Encompassing
O Sustainer
O Rescuer
O Bestower of honor
O Abaser
O Originator
O Restorer

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الرَّحْمٰنُ الرَّحِيمُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa'r-Raḥmānu'r-Raḥīm

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan Rahman, Rahim

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْمَلِكُ الْقُدُّوسُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa'l-Maliku'l-Quddūs

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, the King, the Holy
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan Melik, Kuddüs

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa'l-ʿAzīzu'l-Ḥakīm

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, the Mighty, the Wise
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan Aziz, Hakim

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa'l-Ḥayyu'l-Qayyūm

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, the Living, the Self-Subsisting
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan Hayy, Kayyum

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَالِمُ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa ʿālimu'l-ghaybi wa'sh-shahāda

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, Knower of the unseen and the seen
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan gayb ve şehadeti bilen

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْخَالِقُ الْبَارِئُ الْمُصَوِّرُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa'l-Khāliqu'l-Bāriʾu'l-Muṣawwir

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, the Creator, the Maker, the Fashioner
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan Halik, Bari, Musavvir

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْأَوَّلُ وَالْآخِرُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa'l-Awwalu wa'l-Ākhir

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, the First and the Last
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan Evvel ve Ahir

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الظَّاهِرُ وَالْبَاطِنُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa'ẓ-Ẓāhiru wa'l-Bāṭin

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, the Manifest and the Hidden
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan Zahir ve Batın

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa yuḥyī wa yumīt

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, He gives life and causes death
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan dirilten ve öldüren

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa wa huwa ʿalā kulli shayʾin qadīr

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, and He has power over all things
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan ve her şeye gücü yeten

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ السَّمَاوَاتُ السَّبْعُ وَالْأَرْضُ وَمَنْ فِيهِنَّ
lines.transliteration: Yā man tusabbiḥu lahu's-samāwātu's-sabʿu wa'l-arḍu wa man fīhinn

translation.en: O He whom the seven heavens and the earth and those within glorify
translation.tr: Ey yedi kat gök, yer ve içindekiler tesbih eden

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ الْجِبَالُ وَالْأَشْجَارُ

translation.en: O He whom the mountains and trees glorify
translation.tr: Ey dağların ve ağaçların tesbih ettiği

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ الطُّيُورُ فِي أَوْكَارِهَا
lines.transliteration: Yā man tusabbiḥu lahu'ṭ-ṭuyūru fī awkārihā

translation.en: O He whom the birds glorify in their nests

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ الْوُحُوشُ فِي قِفَارِهَا
lines.transliteration: Yā man tusabbiḥu lahu'l-wuḥūshu fī qifārihā

translation.en: O He whom the wild beasts glorify in their deserts
translation.tr: Ey vahşi hayvanların çöllerde tesbih ettiği

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ الْحِيتَانُ فِي بِحَارِهَا
lines.transliteration: Yā man tusabbiḥu lahu'l-ḥītānu fī biḥārihā

translation.en: O He whom the whales glorify in their seas

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ الْمَلَائِكَةُ الْمُقَرَّبُونَ

translation.en: O He whom the nearest angels glorify

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ الرَّعْدُ بِحَمْدِهِ

translation.en: O He whom the thunder glorifies with His praise
translation.tr: Ey gök gürültüsünün hamd ile tesbih ettiği

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُسَبِّحُ لَهُ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yusabbiḥu lahu kullu shayʾ

translation.en: O He whom everything glorifies
O He who is the One, the Self-Sufficient

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُواً أَحَدٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lam yalid wa lam yūlad wa lam yakun lahu kufuwan aḥad

translation.en: O He who begets not nor was begotten and there is none equal to Him
translation.tr: Ey doğurmayan, doğurulmayan ve hiçbir dengi olmayan

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Excellent Reckoner
O Excellent Physician
O Excellent Watcher
O Excellent Near One
O Excellent Responder
O Excellent Beloved
O Excellent Guarantor
O Excellent Trustee
O Excellent Protector
O Excellent Helper

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Joy of the knowers
O Desire of the lovers
O Intimate of the seekers
O Beloved of the penitent
O Sustainer of the destitute
O Hope of the sinners
O Delight of the worshippers' eyes
O Reliever of the distressed
O Remover of grief from the sorrowful
O God of the first and the last

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O our Lord
O our God
O our Master
O our Succor
O Sufficient for us
O our Guardian
O our Helper
O our Guide
O our Aider
O our Beloved

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He who is the One, the Unique
O He who is the One, the Singular
O He who is the Self-Sufficient, the Sought
O He who is the All-Knowing, the All-Aware
O He who is the All-Hearing, the All-Seeing
O He who is the Subtle, the All-Aware
O He who is the Compassionate, the Merciful
O He who is the Mighty, the Wise
O He who is the Good, the Merciful
translation.tr: Ey Birr sahibi ve Rahîm olan

translation.en: O He who is the Forgiving, the Loving

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Lord of the Glorious Throne
O Doer of whatever He wills
O Guide of every lost one
O Patron of every oppressed one
O Helper of every forsaken one
O Merciful to every poor one
O Comforter of every lonely one
O Companion of every stranger
O Remover of every distress
O Mender of every broken one

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Reliever of worry
O Remover of sorrow
O Forgiver of sin
O Accepter of repentance
O Creator of creation
O Truthful in promise
O Sustainer of the child
O Warner of creation
O Sender of rain
O Director of affairs

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الْمُلْكِ عَظِيمٌ

translation.en: O He who is great in sovereignty

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الْعَظَمَةِ كَرِيمٌ

translation.en: O He who is generous in grandeur

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الرَّحْمَةِ قَدِيمٌ

translation.en: O He who is eternal in mercy

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الثَّنَاءِ حَمِيدٌ

translation.en: O He who is praiseworthy in glorification

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الْجُودِ مَجِيدٌ

translation.en: O He who is glorious in generosity

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الْبَطْشِ شَدِيدٌ

translation.en: O He who is severe in striking

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الْأُمُورِ حَكِيمٌ

translation.en: O He who is wise in matters

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الْعِلْمِ عَلِيمٌ

translation.en: O He who is knowing in knowledge

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الْحُكْمِ عَدْلٌ

translation.en: O He who is just in judgment

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الْغِنَاءِ وَاسِعٌ

translation.en: O He who is vast in richness

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Lord of Majesty and Beauty
O Lord of Might and Perfection
O Lord of Power and Bounty
O Lord of Glory and Perfection
O Lord of Grace and Graciousness
O Lord of Strength and Deeds
O Lord of Giving and Bestowing
O Lord of Mercy and Gentleness
O Lord of Favor and Giving
O Lord of Splendor and Radiance

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا إِلٰهَ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَنْ فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā ilāha man fi's-samāʾi wa man fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O God of those in heaven and those on earth
translation.tr: Ey gökte ve yerde olanların İlahı

lines.arabic: يَا خَالِقَ مَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā khāliqa mā fi's-samāʾi wa mā fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O Creator of what is in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey gökte ve yerde olanların Yaratıcısı

lines.arabic: يَا رَبَّ مَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā rabba mā fi's-samāʾi wa mā fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O Lord of what is in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey gökte ve yerde olanların Rabbi

lines.arabic: يَا مَالِكَ مَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā mālika mā fi's-samāʾi wa mā fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O Sovereign of what is in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey gökte ve yerde olanların Maliki

lines.arabic: يَا رَازِقَ مَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā rāziqa mā fi's-samāʾi wa mā fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O Sustainer of what is in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey gökte ve yerde olanlara rızık veren

lines.arabic: يَا نُورَ مَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā nūra mā fi's-samāʾi wa mā fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O Light of what is in the heavens and the earth

lines.arabic: يَا حَافِظَ مَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā ḥāfiẓa mā fi's-samāʾi wa mā fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O Preserver of what is in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey gökte ve yerde olanları koruyan

lines.arabic: يَا قَاهِرَ مَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā qāhira mā fi's-samāʾi wa mā fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O Subduer of what is in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey gökte ve yerde olanları kahreden

lines.arabic: يَا مُدَبِّرَ مَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā mudabbira mā fi's-samāʾi wa mā fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O Director of what is in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey gökte ve yerde olanları idare eden

lines.arabic: يَا بَاقِيَ بَعْدَ فَنَاءِ مَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā bāqiya baʿda fanāʾi mā fi's-samāʾi wa mā fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O Remaining after the perishing of what is in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey gökte ve yerde olanlar fani olduktan sonra baki kalan

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He who transforms states and conditions
O He who accepts excuses and requests
translation.tr: Ey özür ve istekleri kabul eden

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَعْفُو عَنِ الذُّنُوبِ وَالْأَوْزَارِ

translation.en: O He who pardons sins and burdens
translation.tr: Ey günahları ve ağır yükleri affeden

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يُفْسِدُ عَلَيْهِ تَدْبِيرُهُ مُدَبِّرٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā yufsidu ʿalayhi tadbīruhu mudabbir

translation.en: O He whose plan no planner can spoil

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُعِيدُ الْخَلْقَ كَمَا بَدَأَهُ

translation.en: O He who restores creation as He originated it
translation.tr: Ey yaratılışı başlattığı gibi iade eden

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ حَكَمٌ لَا يَجُورُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa ḥakamun lā yajūr

translation.en: O He who is a Judge who never oppresses

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ عَدْلٌ لَا يَحِيفُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa ʿadlun lā yaḥīf

translation.en: O He who is just and never wrongs

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ غَنِيٌّ لَا يَفْتَقِرُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa ghaniyyun lā yaftaqir

translation.en: O He who is rich and never becomes poor

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ كَبِيرٌ لَا يُوصَفُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa kabīrun lā yūṣaf

translation.en: O He who is great beyond description

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ عَزِيزٌ لَا يُضَامُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa ʿazīzun lā yuḍām

translation.en: O He who is mighty and never wronged

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.
